beaches.name: Panambur Beach
beaches.notes: Main beach, water sports, Dasara fair grounds
beaches.wikipedia_description: Panambur Beach is a beach on the shores of the Arabian Sea in the city of Mangaluru in the Indian state of Karnataka.

beaches.name: Tannirbhavi Beach
beaches.notes: Accessible by ferry, less crowded, peaceful

beaches.name: Ullal Beach
beaches.wikipedia_description: Ullal or Uḷḷāla is a City in Dakshina Kannada district of Karnataka state in India. Ullal City Municipal Council along with the Mangaluru City Corporation forms the continuous Mangaluru urban agglomeration area which is currently the fourth biggest in Karnataka after Bengaluru, Mysore and Hubli-Dharwad. There is also a plan to merge Ullal City Municipality & some gram panchayats along with Mangalu

beaches.name: Kaup Beach
beaches.wikipedia_description:
Kaup may refer to:Kapu, Karnataka, a village in Udupi district, Karnataka, India
Kaup (emporium), an early medieval trade settlement in the Curonian Lagoon
Heinrich Kaup (1912–1999), highly decorated Feldwebel in the Wehrmacht during World War II
Johann Jakob Kaup (1803–1873), German naturalist
Kaup–Kupershmidt equation, the nonlinear fifth-order partial differential equation

beaches.name: Marawanthe Beach
beaches.notes: Road between sea and river, stunning

temples.name: Kadri Manjunath Temple
temples.notes: 1000+ year old, bronze Lokeshwara, must visit
temples.wikipedia_description: Kadri Manjunatha Temple is a historic temple in Mangaluru in the state of Karnataka, India. The incharge and priests in the temple are Shivalli Madhva Brahmins.

temples.name: Dharmasthala Temple
temples.notes: 75km east, famous Shiva temple, free meals
temples.wikipedia_description: Dharmasthala is an Indian temple town on the banks of the Nethravathi River in the taluk of Belthangady of the Dakshina Kannada or southern district in Karnataka, India.

historic_sites.name: Sultan Battery
historic_sites.wikipedia_description: Sulthan Bathery is a major municipal town in the Wayanad district of Kerala, India. It serves as the administrative headquarters of Sulthan Bathery taluk and is the most commercially active urban center in the district.

historic_sites.name: Mangalore Port Area
historic_sites.notes: Old Bunder area, historic trading port

nature_spots.name: Pilikula Nisargadhama
nature_spots.notes: Zoo, boating, nature park, family spot
nature_spots.wikipedia_description: Pilikula Nisargadhama is a multi-purpose tourist attraction, at Vamanjoor, eastern part of Mangaluru city in Karnataka, managed by the District Administration of Dakshina Kannada. It is a major tourist attraction of Mangalore. It attracts large number of tourists due to the availability of multiple facilities.

experiences.name: Yakshagana Performance
experiences.notes: Traditional dance-drama, check Ravindra Kala Bhavana schedule
experiences.wikipedia_description: Yakshagana is a traditional stage performance and semi classical Indian dance drama, found in Tulunadu that is Dakshina Kannada, Udupi, Kasaragod district and Uttara Kannada, Shimoga and western parts of Chikmagalur districts, in the state of Karnataka and in Kasaragod district in Kerala that combines dance, music, dialogue, costume, make-up, and stage techniques with a unique style and form.
